---
name: filter_vehicle_criteria
description: Filter listings according to horsepower, price and mileage criteria
---

# Primary Criteria
- horsepower around 75 ch
- price < 5000 €
- mileage < 15000 km
- location France

# Horsepower Band
Exact band:
72–78 ch

# Relaxation Strategy

Level 1
70–80 ch

Level 2
mileage up to 20000 km

Level 3
price up to 5500 €

# Classification
- exact_match
- relaxed_match
- rejected
